narrative:
Granville Township A (precinct in Licking County) has 1,101 registered voters, with 46.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.6 percentage points.
